pr.title: feat(inventory): controlled CSV canonical ingestion for PR4
pr.rollback: Revert PR4 commit(s); optional SQL rollback to remove PR4-inserted dictionary rows and queue resolution notes.

receipt.goal: Expand canonical inventory coverage using controlled ingestion from draft CSV into product_types/product_type_aliases with deterministic merges and queue resolution.
verification_steps: CSV parsed safely with 1000 rows and 124 canonical slug candidates
Only medium-confidence rows staged for ingestion (500 rows)
Deterministic merge precedence: slug -> normalized label -> existing alias
Overlap collapse applied for pram/pushchair/stroller into stroller canonical concept
Aliases deduplicated and filtered for practical household phrasing
Unmatched queue resolution updates only where deterministic alias mapping exists
Migration emits before/after counts and matcher proofs for pram/cash register/potty/foot gauge
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert PR4 commit(s); run targeted SQL rollback for PR4-added canonical/alias rows and queue notes.
